title: 15D / 14N Best of England, Scotland & Wales Experience with Ireland
details: Experience the best of the United Kingdom and Ireland in one unforgettable journey. Explore historic cities, royal landmarks, dramatic countryside, UNESCO heritage sites, and iconic film locations across England, Scotland, Wales, Northern Ireland, and Ireland.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA Terminal 3. Airline check-in and boarding. Enjoy in-flight amenities. Flight Details: TK85 MNL–IST 21:25–04:50. TK985 IST - LHR 13:05 - 15:05
Arrival in London, capital of England and the United Kingdom. Meet and assist by Tour Director. Transfer by private coach to hotel for check-in and dinner.

Walking city tour including Parliament Square, Westminster Abbey (outside), Churchill War Rooms, St. James’s Park, Buckingham Palace (outside), Changing of the Guards (subject to availability), Piccadilly Circus, Covent Garden, Trafalgar Square, National Gallery (photo stop), and free time at Harrods.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/15D / 14N Best of England, Scotland & Wales Experience with Ireland/Day3_1769581226.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit the Tower of London and see the Crown Jewels. Free time for photos at Tower Bridge. Transfer to Windsor to visit Windsor Castle, the oldest continuously occupied castle in the world. Evening transfer to Bicester area hotel.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/15D / 14N Best of England, Scotland & Wales Experience with Ireland/Day4_1769581237.png

itinerary.day_details: Oxford University walking tour and visit historic college grounds. Stop at famous Harry Potter filming locations. Shopping at Bicester Village Designer Outlet. Return to hotel.

Visit Stonehenge, one of the world’s most famous prehistoric monuments. Continue to Bath for panoramic city tour including Bath Abbey and Pulteney Bridge. Proceed to Cardiff with photo stop at Cardiff Castle. Overnight in Cardiff.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/15D / 14N Best of England, Scotland & Wales Experience with Ireland/Day6_1769581339.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit Stratford-upon-Avon, birthplace of William Shakespeare. Walk through historic landmarks including Holy Trinity Church (outside view). Continue to Liverpool, home of The Beatles, with city drive including Albert Dock and Liverpool Cathedral.

itinerary.day_title: Day 8: Lake District – Gretna Green – Edinburgh, Scotland (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Drive through Lake District National Park and Trossachs National Park. Stop at Gretna Green. Continue to Edinburgh for dinner and overnight.

itinerary.day_title: Day 9: Full Day Edinburgh City Tour (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Explore the Royal Mile, Old Town, New Town, and visit Edinburgh Castle. Free time in the afternoon. Dinner and overnight in Edinburgh.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/15D / 14N Best of England, Scotland & Wales Experience with Ireland/Day9_1769581323.png

itinerary.day_details: Short flight from Edinburgh to Belfast. City tour including City Hall, Queen’s University, Peace Walls and Murals, and Titanic Belfast Museum. Overnight in Belfast.

itinerary.day_title: Day 11: Belfast – Giant’s Causeway – Sligo, Ireland (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Travel along the Causeway Coastal Route. Visit Carrick-a-Rede Rope Bridge (photo stop), Dunluce Castle, and Giant’s Causeway (UNESCO World Heritage Site). Continue to Sligo for overnight.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/15D / 14N Best of England, Scotland & Wales Experience with Ireland/Day11_1769581273.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 12: Sligo – Galway – Cliffs of Moher (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Proceed to Galway city tour including Eyre Square and Latin Quarter. Continue to the Cliffs of Moher, Ireland’s most iconic natural attraction. Overnight near Cliffs of Moher.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/15D / 14N Best of England, Scotland & Wales Experience with Ireland/Day12_1769581302.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 13: Cliffs of Moher – Limerick – Dublin (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Travel to Limerick with visit to King John’s Castle. Continue to Dublin. Evening free time for shopping or leisure.

Free time for last-minute shopping on Grafton Street or optional visit to Trinity College and the Book of Kells. Transfer to Dublin Airport. Flight Details: TK978 DUB–IST 17:00–23:25 / TK84 IST–MNL 02:35–19:10.
Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home.

inclusions: Roundtrip economy airfare via Turkish Airlines
Regional flights with 23 kg baggage allowance
14 nights hotel accommodation on twin sharing (local 4★ category)
Professional European Tour Director throughout the trip
City taxes, hotel taxes, tourist taxes, and permits
Free travel insurance up to 70 years old
exclusions: Beverages during meals and personal expenses
Other items not mentioned in the inclusions
extra_details: Mode of Payment: $300 initial down payment upon reservation, $300 second down payment after 1 month, full payment 45 days before travel date.
Included Entrances: Tower of London & Crown Jewels, Windsor Castle, Stonehenge, Edinburgh Castle, Titanic Belfast Museum, King John’s Castle.
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
